news.t: CALAMOS INVESTMENTS ANNOUNCES THE LISTING OF THE CALAMOS ANTETOKOUNMPO GLOBAL SUSTAINABLE EQUITIES ETF (SROI)

holdings.infoBox: SROI is an equity ETF with a total of 123 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.09%, NVIDIA at 4.53%, Microsoft at 3.52%, Apple at 3.49%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.41%.

overview.description: The Calamos Antetokounmpo Global Sustainable Equities ETF (SROI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in global equities of any market capitalization. The fund targets those that are perceived to have positive ESG ratings and growth potential SROI was launched on Feb 3, 2023 and is issued by Calamos.

data.title: Expert predicts this investing trend is an unstoppable movement
data.text: Calamos Investments President and CEO John Koudounis shares his new ETF and discusses the ESG market on ‘Mornings with Maria.'

data.title: CALAMOS INVESTMENTS ANNOUNCES THE LISTING OF THE CALAMOS ANTETOKOUNMPO GLOBAL SUSTAINABLE EQUITIES ETF (SROI)
